Package neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.designstandards

Enum Class InsulationDesign.InsulationMaterial

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<InsulationDesign.InsulationMaterial>
neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.designstandards.InsulationDesign.InsulationMaterial
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<InsulationDesign.InsulationMaterial>, Constable
Enclosing class:
InsulationDesign
public static enum InsulationDesign.InsulationMaterial extends Enum<InsulationDesign.InsulationMaterial>
Insulation material type with thermal conductivity correlations.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    AEROGEL
    Aerogel blanket - best performance, thin profile.
    CALCIUM_SILICATE
    Calcium silicate - rigid, good for high temp.
    CELLULAR_GLASS
    Cellular glass (Foamglas) - for cryogenic service.
    EXPANDED_PERLITE
    Expanded perlite - for cryogenic service.
    MINERAL_WOOL
    Mineral wool (rockwool) - widely used, max ~700 degC.
    PIR_FOAM
    PIR (polyisocyanurate) foam - excellent insulator, low temp only.

  • Enum Constant Details

    • MINERAL_WOOL

      public static final InsulationDesign.InsulationMaterial MINERAL_WOOL
      Mineral wool (rockwool) - widely used, max ~700 degC.

    • CALCIUM_SILICATE

      public static final InsulationDesign.InsulationMaterial CALCIUM_SILICATE
      Calcium silicate - rigid, good for high temp.

    • PIR_FOAM

      public static final InsulationDesign.InsulationMaterial PIR_FOAM
      PIR (polyisocyanurate) foam - excellent insulator, low temp only.

    • AEROGEL

      public static final InsulationDesign.InsulationMaterial AEROGEL
      Aerogel blanket - best performance, thin profile.

    • CELLULAR_GLASS

      public static final InsulationDesign.InsulationMaterial CELLULAR_GLASS
      Cellular glass (Foamglas) - for cryogenic service.

    • EXPANDED_PERLITE

      public static final InsulationDesign.InsulationMaterial EXPANDED_PERLITE
      Expanded perlite - for cryogenic service.

    • valueOf

      public static InsulationDesign.InsulationMaterial valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • getConductivity

      public double getConductivity(double meanTempC)
      Get thermal conductivity at a given mean temperature.
      Parameters:
      meanTempC - mean temperature in Celsius
      Returns:
      thermal conductivity in W/(m*K)
